'''Diollans''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]], featherless [[Bird/Legends|avians]], that originated on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dioll]], in the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]].<ref name="EA" /> They were short and stocky, with broad beaks, leathery, mottled brown skin, and small intense eyes. Their sense of smell was sensitive enough to find [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] pheromones repulsive.<ref name="A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale" /> They were also masters of unarmed combat.<ref name="EA" />

Some Diollans served the local aristocratic Juvex House, while others opted to live elsewhere in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EA" /> The [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]-based [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Spurch Goa|Spurch "Warhog" Goa]] was a Diollan.<ref name="A Hunter's Fate: Greedo's Tale" />They found the smell of [[Rodian/Legends|Rodians]] disgusting.

{{Species-stub}}
